SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: PRE_ICL_DAYS_MO_3M 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS Files) 

VALUES: — 

COMMENT: Starting in 2016, CMS changed how they describe pharmacy networks. The mail order pharmacies are 
currently referred to as standard mail order pharmacies. There is no change in the meaning of the 
variable, and the data values are the same over time.
